mission.title: localai: Add support for realtime API
mission.description: Add support for realtime API. Requested by 11+ users.

steps.title: Check current localai deployment
steps.description:
Verify your localai version and configuration:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n localai -l app.kubernetes.io/name=localai
helm list -n localai 2>/dev/null || echo "Not installed via Helm"
```
This feature requires a working localai installation.

steps.title: Review localai configuration
steps.description:
Inspect the relevant localai configuration:
```bash
kubectl get all -n localai -l app.kubernetes.io/name=localai
kubectl get configmap -n localai -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=localai
```
OpenAI just extended their API with realtime support with web sockets
 https://openai.com/index/introducing-the-realtime-api/?s=09

LocalAI should support backends with voice capabilities and introduce a compatible API endpoint with OpenAI clients.

steps.title: Apply the fix for Add support for realtime API
steps.description:
**Description**

This PR changes model detection such as it is now considered also in the query (e.g. `?model=xx`) of the URL

Context: extracted from #3714

See the source issue for community-verified solutions.

steps.title: Verify the feature works
steps.description:
Test that the new capability is working as expected:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n localai -l app.kubernetes.io/name=localai
kubectl get events -n localai --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10
```
Confirm the feature described in "Add support for realtime API" is functioning correctly.

resolution.summary:
**Description**

This PR changes model detection such as it is now considered also in the query (e.g. `?model=xx`) of the URL

Context: extracted from #3714

prerequisites.description: A running Kubernetes cluster with localai installed or the issue environment reproducible.
